feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about trail building, and I'm joined by Liam Verbeek, trail builder for the Cascadia Alliance. Liam Verbeek, thanks for being here.
Thanks, Maya. Excited for this one — trail building is something I've been thinking about a lot.
Take me through the decision. How does RockShox fit into this picture?
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about trail building, and I'm joined by Liam Verbeek, trail builder for the Cascadia Alliance. Liam Verbeek, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Building Trails That Last
